description_long: This is a decorative vertical banner suspended from a horizontal pole, supported by a central vertical staff. The banner itself is a light blue fabric with a subtle, symmetrical pattern and a pointed lower edge. The supporting structure consists of a brown pole with metallic finials at both the top and bottom, as well as at the ends of the horizontal crossbar. The metallic elements are gray and have a matte finish, giving the banner a sturdy and ornamental appearance. The fabric hangs freely, with no visible text or imagery, and the overall design is simple yet elegant, suitable for public or ceremonial display. The construction suggests durability for outdoor use, with materials chosen for both function and aesthetics.
description: A vertical blue fabric banner hangs from a brown pole with gray metallic finials, featuring a simple, elegant design and pointed lower edge.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin profile of the banner and the supporting pole, with the fabric barely visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full blue banner, the brown pole, and the gray finials at the ends and top/bottom.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile of the pole and the edge of the hanging fabric.
description_view_3: Rear view of the banner, similar to the front, with the blue fabric and supporting structure clearly visible.
